task_completion.description: The countries shapefile is loaded into the gvSIG project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The layer 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' is visible in the Table of Contents (TOC) panel on the left side of the gvSIG window.

task_completion.description: The symbology or layer properties dialog is opened for the countries layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Properties' or 'Symbology' dialog box is open, specifically indicating it is for the 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries' layer.

task_completion.description: A 'Unique Values' classification is configured using the CONTINENT field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the symbology dialog, a 'Categories' or 'Unique Values' classification method is selected, the classification field is set to 'CONTINENT', and a list of continent names (e.g., Africa, Asia, Europe) is visible with distinct color swatches next to them.

task_completion.description: The main map view displays the countries colored distinctly by continent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map canvas shows the world map where countries are grouped by continent colors (e.g., all countries in Africa share one color, all in South America share another distinct color).

task_completion.description: The gvSIG project is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Project' dialog shows the filename 'continent_categories.gvsproj', or the main gvSIG window title bar displays 'continent_categories'.

task_completion.description: The map view is exported to a PNG file with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export or save image dialog is visible showing the filename 'continent_map.png' and the path '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the gvSIG graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the gvSIG application open with visible menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes being actively used, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The map is genuinely rendered within the GIS software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The colored map is displayed inside the gvSIG View window with standard GIS interface elements around it, not opened in a web browser or basic image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing Python scripts, GDAL commands, or other CLI tools being used to generate the project file or map image directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target layer is 'ne_110m_admin_0_countries'. The classification field is 'CONTINENT', which contains 8 unique values (Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, South America, Seven seas (open ocean)). The project must be saved exactly as 'continent_categories.gvsproj' and the map exported exactly as 'continent_map.png'.
